content:
🔥 AI-Trader | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a dedicated platform for AI agents to autonomously engage in trading activities, fostering collaboration and idea exchange within financial markets.
✨ Key Features: • Instant Agent Integration • Collective Intelligence Trading • Cross-Platform Signal Sync • One-Click Copy Trading • Universal Market Access
📖 Summary: AI-Trader is a fully automated, agent-native trading platform designed to enable AI agents to exchange ideas, trade, and collaborate in financial markets. It supports seamless integration of various AI agents and offers features for collective intelligence, cross-platform signal synchronization, and copy trading across stocks, crypto, forex, and more.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 geo-seo-claude | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Optimizing websites for AI-powered search engines and generating client-ready SEO reports.
✨ Key Features: • GEO-first SEO optimization for AI search engines • Comprehensive audits (full GEO+SEO, quick visibility, technical, content) • Citability scoring for AI content • AI crawler access analysis (robots.txt) • Brand mention scanning
📖 Summary: This Python repository provides a comprehensive GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code, designed to optimize websites for AI-powered search engines while maintaining traditional SEO practices. It offers a suite of tools for auditing, analysis, and reporting, focusing on AI crawler access, brand authority, and structured data.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 web-to-app | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable users to easily create native Android applications from existing websites or web content, making web content accessible as standalone mobile apps.
✨ Key Features: • Website to App Conversion • Media to App Conversion • HTML to App Conversion (React/Vue/Next.js support) • One-Click Build (No Android Studio needed) • AI Development (Natural language coding)
📖 Summary: WebToApp is a native Android application that allows users to convert any website URL into a standalone Android application without requiring any coding knowledge or Android Studio. It offers features like one-click building, AI-powered development tools, and security enhancements.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 plane | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: A self-hostable or cloud-based project management platform for teams to track issues, manage sprints, and organize product roadmaps.
✨ Key Features: • Work Items: Create and manage tasks with a rich text editor, file uploads, sub-properties, and issue referencing. • Cycles: Track sprint progress with burn-down charts and other tools. • Modules: Divide complex projects into smaller, manageable parts.
📖 Summary: Plane is an open-source project management platform designed to be a modern alternative to tools like Jira and Linear. It offers features for managing tasks, sprints, documentation, and product roadmaps, aiming to simplify project tracking without complex tool administration.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 Forkit_Dev | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide AI models and agents with a portable, verifiable, and locally manageable digital identity and provenance record, enhancing trust and traceability in AI development workflows.
✨ Key Features: • Deterministic passport_id derivation for ModelPassport and AgentPassport • Artifact hashing and integrity verification • Lineage tracking • Local JSON registry with SQLite index • Python SDK and CLI
📖 Summary: Forkit Core provides an open-source, local-first passport infrastructure for AI models and agents. It enables deterministic identity, verifiable provenance, and integrity checking, allowing AI systems to have portable and traceable digital identities that can be managed and validated locally or within CI/CD pipelines.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 cognee | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To create intelligent, context-aware memory systems for AI agents by processing and connecting diverse data sources.
✨ Key Features: • Ingests data in any format or structure • Continuously learns and adapts • Provides context for AI agents • Combines vector search and graph databases • Connects data by relationships
📖 Summary: Cognee is an open-source knowledge engine designed to build dynamic and personalized memory for AI agents. It integrates vector search and graph databases with cognitive science principles to make ingested data searchable by meaning and connected by evolving relationships.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
